description: Personal portfolio website showcasing software engineering projects, skills, and technical architecture. Built with React and deployed via GitHub Pages.

features.name: profile_hero_section
features.title: Profile Hero Section
features.description: ProfileHeader component with photo, name, title, description, and call-to-action buttons. Console-themed greeting (> console.log). Responsive layout with avatar and tech-cyber aesthetic.
acceptance: ProfileHeader.jsx renders photo, name, dev title, and description
Console-style greeting with green terminal color is visible
Two CTAs: 'Explorar Proyectos' (primary) and GitHub (secondary)
Responsive: stacks vertically on mobile, horizontal on desktop
Image is circular with green accent border and glow effect
All text uses CSS custom properties for colors

features.name: skills_section
features.title: Skills Section
features.description: Skills component displaying categorized technical skills in a grid of cards. Data-driven from src/data/skills-data.js. Categories: Backend, Frontend, Mobile, Core Engineering, Soft Skills.
acceptance: Skills.jsx reads data from src/data/skills-data.js
Each skill category renders as a card with icon, title, and tags
Grid layout adapts to screen width (auto-fit, min 240px)
Hover state lifts card and highlights border
Skill tags use monospace font and accent color background
CSS follows custom property pattern from variables.css

features.name: projects_grid
features.title: Projects Grid
features.description: Projects component displaying all portfolio projects as interactive cards in a responsive grid. Each card shows title, category, description, tech stack, and links. Data-driven from src/data/projects.js.
acceptance: Projects.jsx maps over projects array from src/data/projects.js
Each card displays: title, category badge, description, tech stack with green separators
Tech stack uses monospace font with ' | ' separators in muted color
'Ver Detalles y Arquitectura →' link navigates to /proyecto/:projectId
External links (GitHub, Web, Play Store) render with '> ' console prefix
Play Store shows 'En fase de pruebas cerradas' when link is empty string
Grid uses auto-fit with min 320px columns
Card hover: lifts 5px, border glows cyan

features.name: project_detail_page
features.title: Project Detail Page
features.description: ProjectDetail component rendered at /proyecto/:projectId. Shows full technical breakdown with ordered challenges, unordered solution lists, tech badges, and back navigation. Handles invalid IDs gracefully.
acceptance: Route /proyecto/:projectId renders detailed view of one project
404 state renders when project ID is not found, with back link
Header shows category, title, description, and tech badges
Technical details section uses ordered list for challenge titles
Each challenge has description text and unordered list with '>' bullet prefix
Tech badges use monospace green-on-dark-green styling
Back button uses monospace font and links to homepage
Responsive layout with proper padding on mobile

features.name: footer_navigation
features.title: Footer & Navigation
features.description: Footer component with copyright, social links (LinkedIn, GitHub, email). Uses subtle dark background with top border separator. Terminal-inspired status indicator with pulsing green dot.
acceptance: Footer.jsx renders current year dynamically via new Date().getFullYear()
Contains LinkedIn, GitHub links, and email contact
Email uses monospace font with blue accent color
Status indicator shows pulsing green dot with 'Sistema operativo' label
Mobile: links stack vertically below copyright
CSS respects custom property color scheme

features.name: home_page_routing
features.title: Home Page & Routing
features.description: Home page composing all sections (ProfileHeader, Skills, Projects) and React Router configuration for SPA navigation between home and project detail views.
acceptance: Home.jsx composes ProfileHeader, Skills, and Projects sections
BrowserRouter wraps the app in App.jsx
Two routes: / (Home) and /proyecto/:projectId (ProjectDetail)
Navigation between pages does not trigger full page reload
App.css provides global reset, typography, and shared component classes
Google Fonts (Inter + JetBrains Mono) loaded once in App.css

features.name: design_system_docs
features.title: Design System & Documentation
features.description: DESIGN.md documenting the visual design system: color palette, typography, component patterns, interactions, and CSS architecture. Central reference for maintaining visual consistency.
acceptance: DESIGN.md exists at project root
Documents color palette with hex values and semantic usage
Documents typography stack (Inter, JetBrains Mono) and sizing
Documents all component patterns with their visual treatments
Documents interaction states (hover, focus, transitions)
Documents responsive breakpoints and layout patterns
Documents CSS architecture (custom properties, component-scoped files)

features.name: github_pages_deployment
features.title: GitHub Pages Deployment
features.description: Configure Vite build for GitHub Pages deployment. Setup gh-pages deploy script, ensure base URL is correct, and verify production build produces working static output.
acceptance: vite.config.js has correct base: '/' for root domain or '/repo/' for project pages
npm run build exits 0 and produces dist/
dist/index.html loads all assets with correct paths
React Router works in production (no 404 on page refresh)
404.html exists in public/ for SPA fallback (or GitHub Actions handles it)

features.name: performance_optimization
features.title: Performance & SEO Optimization
features.description: Optimize bundle size, add lazy loading for routes, set up meta tags for SEO, ensure accessibility compliance, and add performance monitoring.
acceptance: React.lazy() for ProjectDetail page to reduce initial bundle
Meta tags for OG image, description, and keywords in index.html
Lighthouse scores ≥ 90 for Performance, Accessibility, SEO
Image assets are optimized (webp or compressed png)
Semantic HTML throughout all components
ARIA labels on interactive elements

features.name: dark_theme_refinement
features.title: Dark Theme & Visual Refinement
features.description: Refine the existing dark theme with consistent color tokens, smooth transitions, and a unified visual language across all components. Ensure no light-mode vestiges remain.
acceptance: All CSS uses custom properties from variables.css or App.css :root
No hardcoded color values remain in component CSS files
Smooth transition on theme-related properties (0.3s ease)
Profile image glow uses accent-green consistently
Card borders use rgba(255,255,255,0.05) consistently
Remove unused CSS from index.css (original template variables)

features.name: harness_adaptation
features.title: Harness Engineering Adaptation
features.description: Adapt the AI agent harness from generic full-stack template to match the actual portfolio project. Update AGENTS.md, feature_list.json, docs/, and CHECKPOINTS.md to reflect static React SPA on GitHub Pages.
acceptance: AGENTS.md accurately describes the portfolio project
feature_list.json contains portfolio-relevant features
docs/01-conventions.md matches actual JSX/CSS code patterns
docs/02-architecture.md describes static SPA architecture
docs/verification.md references correct build commands
CHECKPOINTS.md references actual project structure
.opencode/agents/*.md have correct project context
DESIGN.md exists with complete visual documentation
